caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears over-ear headphones and gold bracelets on both wrists. In the background, there are white walls with logos featuring stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man adjusts his headphones with both hands, moving them slightly and shifting his facial expression while talking. The camera remains in a static medium shot, focusing on his upper body and head as he interacts with his equipment and continues his discussion.
